add_example(NAME "spot_play" SOURCES spot_play.cpp LINK_PHYSX)

# On Vulkan builds the same scene can render through the Vulkan renderer
# (spot_play --vulkan) instead of OpenGL.
if (TARGET spot_play AND THREEPP_WITH_VULKAN)
    target_compile_definitions(spot_play PRIVATE SPOT_WITH_VULKAN=1)
endif ()

# Parity self-test for the exported policy: pure std (no threepp/PhysX), checks
# SpotPolicy reproduces the torch forward against spot_policy_ref.bin. Run as
# `spot_policy_selftest <dir-with-tpnn-and-ref>` (the .ref is generated by
# export_spot_policy.py; only spot_policy.tpnn is version-controlled).
add_executable(spot_policy_selftest spot_policy_selftest.cpp)
